title: Union High honours learners for outstanding academic performance
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The annual assembly to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The annual assembly to acknowledge the learners who had attained high academic successes during the course of 2025 at Union High School was held on Friday 16 January.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The annual assembly to acknowledge the learners who had attained high academic successes during the course of 2025 at Union High School was held on Friday 16 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Learners were awarded based on their results in 2025.","html":"Learners were awarded based on their results in 2025."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic bars","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Six: Kelly van Rensburg, Lesedi Mphahlele, Madison Tam, Kirsten Trollip, Saskia Strydom, Gemma Murray, Rosemary Brown and Ben Steynberg.","html":"Grade Six: Kelly van Rensburg, Lesedi Mphahlele, Madison Tam, Kirsten Trollip, Saskia Strydom, Gemma Murray, Rosemary Brown and Ben Steynberg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Seven (first time): Reece Gibbons, Mackenzie Preston and Jameson Houseman.","html":"Grade Seven (first time): Reece Gibbons, Mackenzie Preston and Jameson Houseman."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Seven (re-awarded): Tiyanah Abader, Emma Burger, Aaron Dyter, Carlie George, Isabel Hyldig, Taylor Jacobs, Sintayu Kaitro, Mia Labuschagne, Layla Ott, Kate Scott and Shana Theron.","html":"Grade Seven (re-awarded): Tiyanah Abader, Emma Burger, Aaron Dyter, Carlie George, Isabel Hyldig, Taylor Jacobs, Sintayu Kaitro, Mia Labuschagne, Layla Ott, Kate Scott and Shana Theron."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Eight: Lwandle Dali,","html":"Grade Eight: Lwandle Dali,"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Eight (re awarded): Adam Clark, Ryan Collett, Lilly Hunter, Angelique Kyanda-Kaboza, Noël Shakane and Kari Stern.","html":"Grade Eight (re awarded): Adam Clark, Ryan Collett, Lilly Hunter, Angelique Kyanda-Kaboza, Noël Shakane and Kari Stern."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic ties","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade Nine: Clea Clark, Chanté Bezuidenhout and Isabelle Tadesse","html":"Grade Nine: Clea Clark, Chanté Bezuidenhout and Isabelle Tadesse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 10 (first time): Zunaida Deysel, Avuya Tsutsu, Alyssa Trollip, Konke Gawula, Kay-Leigh Hartney, Zoë Mills and Gerda Clarke.","html":"Grade 10 (first time): Zunaida Deysel, Avuya Tsutsu, Alyssa Trollip, Konke Gawula, Kay-Leigh Hartney, Zoë Mills and Gerda Clarke."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 10 (re-awarded): Isabella Hulleman, Antonia Adams and Cayla Newton.","html":"Grade 10 (re-awarded): Isabella Hulleman, Antonia Adams and Cayla Newton."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic half colours","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 11: Kirsten Collett, Richard Murray, Jade Slater and Lina Tadesse.","html":"Grade 11: Kirsten Collett, Richard Murray, Jade Slater and Lina Tadesse."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic full colours","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 11 (first time): Amber Slater.","html":"Grade 11 (first time): Amber Slater."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic half colours","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 12: Megan Putter, Anebel Norval and Benjamin Lemke.","html":"Grade 12: Megan Putter, Anebel Norval and Benjamin Lemke."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 12 (re-awarded): Anna Bouwer and Ashleigh Shell.","html":"Grade 12 (re-awarded): Anna Bouwer and Ashleigh Shell."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic full colours","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 12 (first time): Taegen Hamid and Jade Palmer.","html":"Grade 12 (first time): Taegen Hamid and Jade Palmer."},{"type":"heading","text":"Academic full colours","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grade 12 (re-awarded): Amber Bezuidenhout, Katelyn Trollip and Misha Newton.","html":"Grade 12 (re-awarded): Amber Bezuidenhout, Katelyn Trollip and Misha Newton."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
